requirement_topic.en: Local Egyptian Importer / In-Country Agent and Arabic Labelling
requirement_topic.zh: 当地埃及进口商/境内代理及阿拉伯语标注
requirement_topic.zht: 當地埃及進口商/境內代理及阿拉伯語標注

summary.en: An Egyptian-registered company must act as the local importer for wireless devices entering Egypt. NTRA type approval is typically held in the name of the Egyptian importer or an authorised local representative. Product labelling must include the NTRA approval number in Arabic and/or English. Arabic labelling for consumer-facing product information is increasingly required under Egyptian consumer protection rules (Consumer Protection Law No. 181 of 2018). No formal in-country representative registration equivalent to a US Agent or EU Authorised Representative system currently exists, but the local importer relationship is a practical and legal prerequisite.
summary.zh: 无线设备进入埃及须由埃及注册公司担任当地进口商。NTRA型式核准通常以埃及进口商或授权当地代表的名义持有。产品标签须以阿拉伯语和/或英语标注NTRA批准号。依据埃及消费者保护法（2018年第181号），面向消费者的产品信息越来越需要阿拉伯语标注。目前埃及无类似美国代理人或欧盟授权代表的正式境内代表人注册制度，但当地进口商关系是实际和法律上的前提条件。
summary.zht: 無線裝置進入埃及須由埃及注冊公司擔任當地進口商。NTRA型式核准通常以埃及進口商或授權當地代表的名義持有。產品標籤須以阿拉伯語和/或英語標注NTRA批准號。依據埃及消費者保護法（2018年第181號），面向消費者的產品資訊越來越需要阿拉伯語標注。目前埃及無類似美國代理人或歐盟授權代表的正式境內代表人注冊制度，但當地進口商關係是實際和法律上的前提條件。

standards_or_laws: Egypt Telecommunications Regulation Law No. 10 of 2003 (NTRA type approval held by Egyptian entity)
NTRA label requirement: approval number in Arabic and/or English on product
Egypt Consumer Protection Law No. 181 of 2018 (Arabic labelling for consumer products)
Egypt Companies Law No. 159 of 1981 (local entity registration requirements)

summary.en: For export, Chinese manufacturers typically appoint a foreign distributor or agent. No formal in-country representative registration is required in China for the manufacturer itself. CCC certificates and SRRC approvals are issued to the Chinese manufacturer or a designated applicant. For export to Egypt, the Chinese exporter must identify and contract with a registered Egyptian importer to hold the NTRA approval.
summary.zh: 就出口而言，中国制造商通常委托境外经销商或代理人。中国制造商本身无需在中国进行境内代表人正式注册。CCC证书和SRRC批准颁发给中国制造商或指定申请人。出口至埃及时，中国出口商须与已注册的埃及进口商签约，由其持有NTRA批准。
summary.zht: 就出口而言，中國製造商通常委託境外經銷商或代理人。中國製造商本身無需在中國進行境內代表人正式注冊。CCC證書和SRRC批准頒發給中國製造商或指定申請人。出口至埃及時，中國出口商須與已注冊的埃及進口商簽約，由其持有NTRA批准。

standards_or_laws: No formal equivalent — Chinese manufacturer holds CCC and SRRC approvals directly
CCC certificate issued to Chinese manufacturer or designated applicant
SRRC type approval issued to Chinese applicant

gap.en: A registered Egyptian company must be identified as local importer before an NTRA type approval application can be filed. Without an Egyptian importer, the device cannot legally be imported or sold in Egypt. Arabic labelling on the product and packaging is increasingly enforced under consumer protection law. Chinese manufacturers without an existing Egypt distribution partner must establish this relationship before beginning the NTRA approval process.
gap.zh: 申请NTRA型式核准前，须确定一家已注册的埃及公司作为当地进口商。若无埃及进口商，设备不得于埃及合法进口或销售。产品及包装上的阿拉伯语标注依据消费者保护法规执行力度日益加强。尚无埃及分销伙伴的中国制造商须先建立这一关系，再启动NTRA批准流程。
gap.zht: 申請NTRA型式核准前，須確定一家已注冊的埃及公司作為當地進口商。若無埃及進口商，裝置不得於埃及合法進口或銷售。產品及包裝上的阿拉伯語標注依據消費者保護法規執行力度日益加強。尚無埃及分銷夥伴的中國製造商須先建立這一關係，再啟動NTRA批准流程。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A registered Egyptian company must act as local importer and hold the NTRA type approval. The NTRA approval number must appear on the product label in Arabic and/or English. Arabic product labelling is increasingly required under Egyptian consumer protection law. Chinese manufacturers without an Egyptian distribution partner must establish this relationship before applying for NTRA type approval.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 须由注册埃及公司担任当地进口商并持有NTRA型式核准。NTRA批准号须以阿拉伯语和/或英语标注于产品标签。依据埃及消费者保护法，阿拉伯语产品标注要求日益严格。尚无埃及分销伙伴的中国制造商须先建立此关系，再申请NTRA型式核准。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 須由注冊埃及公司擔任當地進口商並持有NTRA型式核准。NTRA批准號須以阿拉伯語和/或英語標注於產品標籤。依據埃及消費者保護法，阿拉伯語產品標注要求日益嚴格。尚無埃及分銷夥伴的中國製造商須先建立此關係，再申請NTRA型式核准。
